---
title: "Elections Data Specialist"
description: "Managed and analyzed precinct-level GIS data for voter registration and electoral planning."
org: "Boone County Clerk's Office"
org-url: "https://boonecountyclerk.ky.gov/"
date: "2017-08-01"
dates: "Aug 2017 – Feb 2020"
location: "Burlington, KY"
categories: [Experience]
---

::: {.nw-detail-lead}
<a class="nw-tl-org" href="https://boonecountyclerk.ky.gov/" target="_blank" rel="noopener">Boone County Clerk's Office</a> · Aug 2017 – Feb 2020 · Burlington, KY
:::

At the Boone County Clerk's Office, I managed and analyzed precinct-level GIS data supporting elections.

- Managed precinct-level GIS data for voter registration.
- Analyzed spatial data to support electoral planning.
- Maintained data quality across voter and precinct records.
